source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Precise operations UI typography with English and Japanese guidance for dashboards, incident queues, filters, status labels, command palettes, dense tables, and approval workflows.
layout: Crisp 8px product grids, needle-line separators, compact dashboard modules, structured navigation, restrained shadows, 8px cards and controls, and boreal texture swatches for focused operational work.

prompts.label: Transparent spruce needle motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only spruce needles as an isolated complete cutout source for a design-system motif, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: One natural boreal spruce twig with dense radial dark green spruce needles, cool blue shadow between needles, a few cone-brown woody stem details and tiny mature cone scales tucked near the base. Accurate spruce needle form: short stiff individual needles, crisp pointed tips, slightly waxy surface, varied deep green tones, subtle boreal neutral highlights. No full tree, no forest scene, no snow, no extra plants.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; show the whole twig and needle cluster without cropping; elegant diagonal branch gesture suitable for a motif asset.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves dark green needles, blue-shadow depth, cone-brown woody texture, and crisp operational clarity.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no second separate subject, no animals, no flowers, no bright unrelated colors.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Spruce Needle light-mode design-system board
Input image: Use the visible transparent spruce needle motif as the source reference.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Spruce Needle", derived from the spruce needle cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible crisp operations system.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the spruce needles. The board must visibly respect dark spruce green needles, cool blue shadow between needles, cone-brown woody stems, boreal neutral highlights, pointed needle geometry, and crisp operational clarity.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, at least 2400px wide, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Spruce Needle, Spruce Needle, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: dark spruce green primary, blue shadow ink, cone brown operational secondary, boreal mist background, needle frost surfaces, spruce tip highlights, muted bark neutrals, controlled amber warning from cone brown, no unrelated colors.
Typography: crisp operations product UI guidance with English and Japanese type. Use a precise grotesk/sans pairing for dashboards and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, search, data tables, filters, and incident workflow text. Include short Japanese labels such as 運用, 検索, 状態, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, operations chart, line chart, bar chart, event table, queue table, command palette, global search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple crisp icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, density notes, and token chips.
Style: premium product design system, quiet operations dashboard, boreal mist paper surfaces, dark spruce primary actions, blue-shadow active navigation and focus, cone-brown secondary controls, needle-line dividers, subtle spruce-needle texture, compact data density, restrained shadows, all cards and controls use 8px radii.
Text: use short readable labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Spruce Needle", no tiny illegible paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Spruce Needle dark-mode design-system board
Input images: Use the visible transparent spruce needle motif and the visible light-mode design-system board as references.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Spruce Needle". It must feel like the same crisp operations system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the spruce needle motif and light-mode board.
Reference use: Preserve the same palette roles, component language, layout density, 8px radius system, needle-line texture, dashboard/data/forms/table/search/status/token coverage, and English plus Japanese typography guidance from the light board. Keep dark spruce green, blue shadow, cone brown, boreal neutrals, and crisp operations accents as the only color source.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, at least 2400px wide, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Spruce Needle, Dark Mode, Spruce Needle, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: deepest blue-shadow spruce background, dark green elevated panels, mist text, spruce tip highlights, cone-brown secondary controls, boreal neutral borders, controlled amber warning from cone brown, deep needle green success, no unrelated colors.
Typography: crisp operations product UI guidance with English and Japanese type. Use a precise grotesk/sans pairing for dashboards and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, search, data tables, filters, and incident workflow text. Include short Japanese labels such as 運用, 検索, 状態, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, operations chart, line chart, bar chart, event table, queue table, command palette, global search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple crisp icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, density notes, and token chips.
Visual details: dark background derived from the needle cluster's deepest blue shadows, elevated panels in dark spruce green, boreal mist foreground text, spruce-green primary actions, blue-shadow focus rings, cone-brown secondary and warning accents, subtle needle-striation overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, restrained shadows, all cards and controls use 8px radii.
Text: use short readable labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Spruce Needle", no tiny illegible paragraphs.
